task_completion.description: Log into the GNU Health web interface using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the GNU Health login screen with credentials entered, or the main GNU Health dashboard visible after successful login at localhost:8000.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Health Professionals section and open the form to create a new record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface showing the 'Health Professionals' list view or a blank 'New Health Professional' form.

task_completion.description: Enter the first name 'Maria' and last name 'Santos' into the health professional form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Maria' and 'Santos' entered into the respective First Name and Last Name fields (or a combined Name field) within the GNU Health web form.
The text 'MED20247891' entered into the Professional License ID, License, or Code field in the form.

task_completion.description: Save the newly created Health Professional record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message of a saved record, the form switching to a read-only saved state, or the new entry 'Maria Santos' appearing in the Health Professionals list view.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the GNU Health web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the GNU Health interface at localhost:8000, rather than API testing tools (like Postman) or terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent entered data into the actual application and not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields should be surrounded by genuine GNU Health UI elements (menus, tabs, standard layout), not a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a terminal or database client to insert the record directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or database management tools (like psql) executing SQL INSERT commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The health professional record must explicitly contain the First Name 'Maria', Last Name 'Santos', and Professional License ID 'MED20247891'. Any other metadata regarding occupation or industry is not required or evaluated.
